cards.front: What is the absolute method of changing file permissions called?
What is the relative method of changing file permissions called?
What is the use of the -R option with chmod?
What is the use of the u, g, and o options with chmod?
cards.back: Specify permissions for user, group, and others respectively

cards.front: What is the use of the a option with chmod?
cards.back: Specify permissions for user, group, and others simultaneously
